'''Imperial Noghri Commando Team 22''' was an Imperial military unit active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="HttE" /> In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' to [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].</ref> led by [[Khabarakh]] [[clan Kihm'bar]], the team was sent to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in order [[Mission to Kashyyyk (Thrawn campaign)|to capture]] [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. Organa Solo was hiding there under the protection of numerous [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], but their numbers thinned significantly after several days of inactivity.<ref name="HttE" />

An attack was mounted, but the attempt was a failure, resulting in the deaths of all the [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] except Khabarakh. During the initial attack, Leia encountered Khabarakh; he had the chance to kill her, but did not after he realized that she was the [[Mal'ary'ush]], daughter and heir to the Noghri's former master, the Lord [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. He was knocked unconscious by [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], a friend of Organa Solo's, and later interrogated. After the interrogation, Khabarakh and Leia agreed to meet at [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. He would then escort her to [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]], the Noghri's homeworld.<ref name="HttE" />
